title: poa tenerrima
intro: Poa tenerrima, also known as the slender poa or gentle meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits associated with Poa tenerrima include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
